data.name: SimGenHOI: Physically Realistic Whole-Body Humanoid-Object Interaction via Generative Modeling and RL

data.description: SimGenHOI: Physically Realistic Whole-Body Humanoid-Object Interaction via Generative Modeling and RL discusses Whole-Body Control (WBC).
SimGenHOI: Physically Realistic Whole-Body Humanoid-Object Interaction via Generative Modeling and RL uses Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO).
SimGenHOI: Physically Realistic Whole-Body Humanoid-Object Interaction via Generative Modeling and RL discusses Dexterous Manipulation.
